system.name: DocsAI
system.description: A documentation and knowledge management assistant built on top of a large language model (LLM).
system.purpose: To assist users in creating, organizing, and managing documentation, knowledge bases, and technical content.

features.document_generation: Automatically generates documentation from raw data, code, or technical content.
features.knowledge_organization: Helps structure and categorize information into logical formats like FAQs, guides, and tutorials.
features.content_enrichment: Adds context, examples, and explanations to improve clarity and usability.
features.multilingual_support: Supports multiple languages for global accessibility.
features.integration: Can integrate with tools like Notion, Confluence, and Git for seamless workflow.

security.access_control: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) ensures only authorized users can access specific content.
security.data_encryption: End-to-end encryption for data at rest and in transit.
security.audit_logs: Detailed logs for tracking access and changes to sensitive information.

user_experience.intuitive_interface: User-friendly interface for easy navigation and content creation.
user_experience.search_capabilities: Advanced search with filters for quick retrieval of information.
user_experience.collaboration_tools: Support for team collaboration, including comments, version control, and shared workspaces.

limitations.contextual_understanding: May require additional clarification for highly specialized or ambiguous content.
limitations.training_data_bias: Performance may vary based on the quality and diversity of training data.
limitations.real_time_data: Cannot access real-time data or external systems without integration.

llm_components.model: Large Language Model (LLM) with fine-tuning for technical documentation tasks.
llm_components.training_data: Curated dataset of technical documents, code repositories, and user-generated content.
llm_components.fine_tuning: Tailored to understand and generate high-quality documentation, including code comments, API references, and user guides.
llm_components.prompt_engineering: Custom prompts designed to guide the model in producing structured, accurate, and context-aware outputs.

use_cases.software_development: Generate API documentation, code comments, and technical guides.
use_cases.knowledge_bases: Create and maintain internal knowledge bases for teams and organizations.
use_cases.educational_content: Develop tutorials, course materials, and learning resources.
use_cases.customer_support: Build FAQs, troubleshooting guides, and support documentation.

deployment.cloud: Deployed on scalable cloud infrastructure for high availability and performance.
deployment.on-premise: Available as an on-premise solution for organizations with strict data governance requirements.
deployment.hybrid: Supports hybrid deployment models for flexibility and control.

future_directions.multi_modal_support: Integration with visual tools for diagram creation and content visualization.
future_directions.voice_assisted_documentation: Voice-to-text capabilities for hands-free documentation creation.
future_directions.ai_co_pilot: AI-powered co-pilot for real-time assistance during content creation and editing.

ethical_considerations.data_privacy: Complies with data protection regulations like GDPR and CCPA.
ethical_considerations.bias_reduction: Regular audits and updates to reduce bias and improve fairness in generated content.
ethical_considerations.transparency: Clear communication about the role of AI in content creation and decision-making.
